raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad juhtija taß zehninsch
atkat Grahmatu us Refumu to
Ranzleri/ un us Simsaju to Raß-
fitajn / un teem zitteem winnu
Draudses/ kas Samarijā dsh-
woja/ un us teem zitteem wiann-
pufs Uppes/ Meeru un Apswei-
zinaschanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta Grahmata / fo juhs
us man eßat fuhtijschi / irr skai
dri manna Preekfcha laffita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no mannim tappe pa-
wehlehts/ ka meklehts taptu. Un
tee irr atraddufchi/ ka fchis Pils-
fahts preekfchajds Laikos prett
teem Kehnixeem irr zehlees/ un
ka Dumpis un Atkahpschana
ecksch ta irr pazelta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir wareni Kehnini irr
pahr Jerusalemi bijuschi/ un tee
irr waldischi pahr wiffu / kas
wiappufs Uppes irr/ un teem irr
Mefli/ Teefa / un Mutta dohta
tappusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz paweblejt/ ka fchee
Wihri tohp aiskaweti/ un ka fchs
Pitsfahts ne tohp uszelts/ ka-
mebr tas no mannim tohp pa-
wehlehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sargajeetees tad/ ka juhs
kuhtri ne effat/ ka tas Launums
ne wairojahs tam Kehniram par
Skahdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu no ta (Laika/) 
kad tahs Grahmatas Eekfchu-
Raßfs no ta Kehnina Artasastus
preektch Rekumu un Simsaju te
Raßfitaju / un preekfch winna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nittejahs tas Dar-
pee ta Deewa Nammu/ kas
rusalemē (dsthwō)/ un valit
nesirahdahs libds ohtram Ga-
dam tahs Waldischanas Da-
jusa/ to Persceu Kehnixa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Draudses laßhts tappe/zehla-
tce teelu Steig chanu us Jerusa-
nut prett teem Judeem/un ais-
weja tohs ar Warru un Speh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta V. Nodalla.
Aggajus un Sakarijus / tee Praweeschi /
mahza un spehzina tohs Kaudis/ lai tee sku-
bina ustaifht (to Deewa Nammu)
Rad tee Jadi to darra : 2. Apjuhds to
Tatnajus tas Semmes Walditajs pee
Rehuma Darijsfa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad fluddinaja tas Pr-
weets Aggajus un Sa-
karijus Jddus Dehls
(abbi) Praweeschi teem Ju-
decm/ kas Judā un Jerusale-
mē dshwoja/ eeffch ta Israē-
Deewa Wahrdv runnaja tee u-
winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Sernababel
Sealtieta Dehls/ un Jesuus Jo-
zadaka Dehls/ un talz uszelt t-
Deewa Nammu/ kas Jerusale-
imē (dsthwō)/ un libds ar teem-
tee Deewa Praweeschi/ kas toh-
eedrohtchinaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laika nahze pe-
teem Tatnajus tas Semines-
Walditajs fchaipuss Uppes/
Star Bosnajus ar fawn Drau-
dsi/ un fazzija us teem ta: Rae-
rr jums Walku Dewis fch-
Nammu ustaifht/ un fcho Mut-
ri uszelt?
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
